app.name: StyleVault
app.localNotice: Demo version: your data lives only in this browser. If you don't open the app for about 7 days (or clear the cache), your device may delete it. In the online version with an account your data is safe in the cloud.
app.cloudPausedNotice: The online service isn't responding: after a period of inactivity it goes to sleep. Your data is safe — let Lorenzo know and try again in a few minutes.

common.syncError: Cloud save failed: retry when you are back online

auth.name: Name
auth.googleSoon: Google sign-in arrives with the online version
auth.checkEmail: Check your email: we sent you a confirmation link
auth.serviceUnreachable: The online service isn't responding: after a period of inactivity it goes to sleep and needs a restart. Let Lorenzo know and try again in a few minutes — your data is safe.

onboarding.intro: Three steps to get started: your avatar, your city, your clothes.
onboarding.stepPhotoHint: Upload a full-body photo of yourself: you'll use it to try on outfits "on you". It stays on your device and is optional.
onboarding.stepCityHint: Outfits are suggested based on this city's real weather. You can change it anytime.

wardrobe.title: My Wardrobe
wardrobe.subtitle: {{count}} items
wardrobe.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

addItem.title: Add Item
addItem.photoHint: Take or upload a photo of the item
addItem.linkHint: Paste a link from an online store
addItem.linkError: This store blocks automatic reading: fill the fields manually, the link is saved anyway.

outfit.title: Outfit
outfit.subtitle: The right look for the weather ahead
outfit.noItemsForOutfit: Your wardrobe isn't enough yet: you need at least a top, bottoms and shoes that fit the season.
outfit.regenerateHint: Locked items stay, the rest changes
outfit.manualWeather: Weather unavailable: set the conditions yourself

tryon.title: Try On Outfit
tryon.hint: Tap a slot to add or change an item
tryon.noItems: No items of this kind in your wardrobe
tryon.modelIntro: The person in your photo, dressed with the real photos of the chosen items, in their proportions. Free: the cutout runs on your device, the photo never leaves it.
tryon.modelNoFigure: I can't make out a full figure in the photo: use a standing, front-facing, full-body photo.
tryon.modelError: Couldn't prepare the photo: try again or change photo.
tryon.modelNeedsPhoto: Upload a full-body photo of yourself to start (it stays on your device).
tryon.photoNoOutfit: First pick the items above, then generate the photo here.
tryon.promptIntro: Generate an English prompt to paste into ChatGPT or Gemini along with your photo and the garment photos: the result is a photograph of you wearing them. Free, no key required.
tryon.promptShare: Send photos and prompt to the AI app
tryon.promptShareHint: Your phone's share sheet opens: pick ChatGPT or Gemini. Photos arrive in order (1 is you); if the text doesn't come through, tap Copy prompt and paste it.
tryon.promptStep2: Upload a full-body photo of yourself
tryon.promptStep4: Paste the copied prompt and generate the image

avatar.referenceHint: It helps you tune the avatar until it looks like you. It stays on your device only.

advice.colorsClash: Some colors clash: try swapping a bold item
advice.tooManyColors: More than three bold colors: a neutral item rebalances the look
advice.tooLight: Too light for {{temp}}°: add a layer
advice.tooWarm: You may feel hot at {{temp}}°: lighten one piece
advice.wornRecently: You wore this recently: logged on {{date}}
advice.elevated: The outerwear elevates the look: fits formal occasions too
advice.uvHigh: Strong sun: sunglasses and a hat are good allies

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Your outfits day by day
calendar.noSavedOutfits: No saved outfits yet: generate one from the Outfit page

wishlist.title: My Wishlist
wishlist.subtitle: Items you desire
wishlist.emptyAction: Add the first item of your dreams

profile.title: Profile
profile.statsNoData: Statistics appear once you start logging outfits in the calendar

light-spring.name: Light Spring
light-spring.desc: Warm, light, delicate colors: peach, mint, cream. Soft luminous shades suit you — never heavy ones.

light-summer.name: Light Summer
light-summer.desc: Cool, light, dusty colors: lavender, powder pink, powder blue. Gentle tones beat strong contrast.

true-spring.name: True Spring
true-spring.desc: Warm, lively colors: coral, grass green, golden yellow. Warmth is your signature: keep black away from your face.

true-summer.name: True Summer
true-summer.desc: Cool, soft colors: mauve, blues, light plum. Silver and dusty tones flatter you.

true-autumn.name: True Autumn
true-autumn.desc: Warm, earthy colors: rust, olive, mustard, copper. Spice and earth tones are yours.

true-winter.name: True Winter
true-winter.desc: Cool, crisp colors: fuchsia, royal blue, cherry red, black and white. Clean contrast is your strength.

bright-spring.name: Bright Spring
bright-spring.desc: Warm, vivid colors: bright coral, turquoise, golden yellow. The brighter the color, the better it works.

bright-winter.name: Bright Winter
bright-winter.desc: Cool, vivid colors: fuchsia, electric blue, cherry red. Sharp contrast and saturated shades light you up.

soft-autumn.name: Soft Autumn
soft-autumn.desc: Warm, muted colors: sage, honey, dusty terracotta. Blended dusty tones flatter more than pure brights.

soft-summer.name: Soft Summer
soft-summer.desc: Cool, muted colors: lilac, sage, ice blue. Soft shades, never loud ones.

deep-autumn.name: Deep Autumn
deep-autumn.desc: Warm, deep colors: wine, pine green, chocolate. Rich dark shades frame your face.

deep-winter.name: Deep Winter
deep-winter.desc: Cool, deep colors: burgundy, navy, emerald. Intense darks with pure white contrast.
